Commands  ›   ›  Transfer Specific Named Standard Items From Source

Transfer Specific Named Standard Items From Source

writes to model Public API · not yet exposed

Transfers specific named items within a category from a source .rvt to the current project. For example, transfer only "MEP - Duct" and "MEP - Pipe" filters from the source. Opens source detached via TransferStandardsSourceDocumentManager. Executes via TransferStandardsExecutor.

Before you run this

Active Revit document must be open. Source file and named items must exist.

After it runs

Specified named items transferred from source to target.

When to use this

  • User wants to selectively transfer specific filters or templates.
Don't use this when

Bulk category transfers (use TransferAllStandardsFromSourceByCategory).

REST API

Not yet exposed

This command does not carry a [RestApi] attribute today. Once tagged, this section will auto-populate with:

  • POST /api/v1/commands/transfer_specific_named_standard_items_from_source
  • Request body schema (from [RestApiParam])
  • Response schema (from [RestApiResponse])
  • curl / JS / Python code examples

Keywords & intent patterns

transfer specific items · transfer named filters · selective transfer
